    S

    setBarBackground(Color) - Method in class CaetanoSoft.Utilities.UI.SplashScreenManager.SplashScreenManager
    Set the progress bar background color witch the text will be draw.
    setBarColor(Color) - Method in class CaetanoSoft.Utilities.UI.SplashScreenManager.SplashScreenManager
    Set the progress bar foreground color witch the text will be draw.
    setBarRectangle(int, int, int, int) - Method in class CaetanoSoft.Utilities.UI.SplashScreenManager.SplashScreenManager
    Set the rectangle where the progress bar will be draw.
    setBarRectangle(Rectangle) - Method in class CaetanoSoft.Utilities.UI.SplashScreenManager.SplashScreenManager
    Set the rectangle where the progress bar will be draw.
    setFontBackground(Color) - Method in class CaetanoSoft.Utilities.UI.SplashScreenManager.SplashScreenManager
    Set the font background color witch the text will be draw.
    setFontColor(Color) - Method in class CaetanoSoft.Utilities.UI.SplashScreenManager.SplashScreenManager
    Set the font foreground color witch the text will be draw.
    setFontName(String) - Method in class CaetanoSoft.Utilities.UI.SplashScreenManager.SplashScreenManager
    Set the font name witch the text will be draw.
    setFontSize(int) - Method in class CaetanoSoft.Utilities.UI.SplashScreenManager.SplashScreenManager
    Set the font point size witch the text will be draw.
    setFontStyle(int) - Method in class CaetanoSoft.Utilities.UI.SplashScreenManager.SplashScreenManager
    Set the font style witch the text will be draw.
    setTextRectangle(int, int, int, int) - Method in class CaetanoSoft.Utilities.UI.SplashScreenManager.SplashScreenManager
    Set the rectangle where the text will be draw.
    setTextRectangle(Rectangle) - Method in class CaetanoSoft.Utilities.UI.SplashScreenManager.SplashScreenManager
    Set the rectangle where the text will be draw.
    showFileOpenDialog(Component, String, String, boolean, int, boolean, FileFilter[], FileView[]) - Static method in class CaetanoSoft.Utilities.UI.FileChooserHelper
    Handles the FileOpenDialog, with a file extension filter.
    showFileSaveDialog(Component, String, String, String, boolean, FileFilter, FileView) - Static method in class CaetanoSoft.Utilities.UI.FileChooserHelper
    Handles the FileSaveDialog, with a file extension filter.
    SplashScreenManager - Class in CaetanoSoft.Utilities.UI.SplashScreenManager
    This class manages the Java 1.6 (and above) SplashScreen object.
